title: MKS Immigration Lawyers Recognized - MKS Immigration Lawyers
content:
Once again, MKS Immigration Lawyers have been recognized as one of Canada’s top immigration law firms for 2026 in leading peer-reviewed rankings:
Globe & Mail Best Law Firms in Canada : MKS Immigration Lawyers recognized nationally for immigration
Chambers : MKS Immigration Lawyers ranked nationally, Alex Stojicevic, Rudi Kischer and Kyle Hyndman ranked individually
Best Lawyers in Canada : Alex Stojicevic, Rudi Kischer, Kyle Hyndman recognized individually
Who’s Who Legal : Alex Stojicevic designated a Global Elite Thought Leader, Kyle Hyndman and Rudi Kischer designated as Recommended
We pride ourselves on providing industry-leading service and expertise to individuals and organizations, and are grateful for the recognition of our peers.
